context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies that requests.cache() does not exist instead of hallucinating an implementation. Brevity compression should not cause the agent to skip the correction and blindly implement a nonexistent API.

checklist.name: Identifies that requests.cache() does not exist
checklist.description: States that the requests library has no built-in cache() method

checklist.name: Suggests a real alternative
checklist.description: Recommends an actual caching approach: requests-cache, cachetools, manual caching with a dict/TTL, or functools.lru_cache

checklist.name: Does not hallucinate a working requests.cache() implementation
checklist.description: Does not write code that calls requests.cache() as if it were a real method
